notes: Pure place-theoretic surjectivity argument (no CoordHom); comap_isNontrivial_of_finiteDimensional and exists_valuationSubring_comap_le are general valuation-theory results not directly called in the file (they document the route to PlaceLift but are not wired in). surjective_of_finite_comorphism_and_hproj is a verbatim alias of surjective_of_PlaceLift_and_hproj, existing only as a named API endpoint; the file is not imported by any other file in the project.
